scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/backend && npm install
scripts.ci:test: npm run prisma:validate && cd apps/backend && npm run build && npm test && npm run test:e2e && cd ../.. && npm run build:web
scripts.test:all: cd apps/backend && npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup:dev: npm run docker:up && npm run db:setup
